input.background: Data for this example come from a case-control study on esophageal cancer. Cases were men diagnosed with esophageal cancer from a region in France. Controls were selected at random from electoral lists from the same geographic region.
input.question: Cross tabulate the data for cases and controls based on daily alcohol consumption dichotomized at 80 grams/day.

output.answer: Table 18.15 cross tabulates the data for cases and controls based on daily alcohol consumption dichotomized at 80 grams/day.

AlcoholConsumption.description: Daily alcohol consumption dichotomized at 80 grams/day.

EsophagealCancerCases.description: Number of cases diagnosed with esophageal cancer.

EsophagealCancerNoncases.description: Number of non-cases (controls) without esophageal cancer.
